name: io.github.MAG-Cie/mcp-microsoft-todo
description: MCP server for Microsoft To Do via Microsoft Graph. MSAL device code flow, no client secret needed.

environmentVariables.name: MS_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Application (client) ID from your Azure AD App Registration. See the README for setup instructions.

environmentVariables.name: MS_TENANT
environmentVariables.description: Microsoft tenant: 'common' (personal + work), 'consumers' (personal only), 'organizations' (work only), or your specific tenant ID.
